home.title: Build documentation that feels like a product
home.tagline: A fast Astro-powered docs theme and CLI with a VitePress-style landing page.
home.description: Point Stropress at any docs directory, define your navbar and sidebar in config.json, and generate a polished static documentation site with one command.

features.title: Astro Native
features.details: Use Astro and MDX to render a fast static docs site without building a custom markdown pipeline.

features.title: CLI Driven
features.details: Run stropress dev or stropress build against any docs directory by passing --dir.

features.title: Config First
features.details: Navbar, sidebar, homepage hero, CTA buttons, and features are all defined in config.json.

site.title: Stropress 文档
site.description: 使用 Stropress 构建文档站点

home.title: 构建像产品一样的文档站
home.tagline: 基于 Astro 的文档主题与 CLI，开箱即用。
home.description: 将 Stropress 指向你的 docs 目录，通过 config.json 配置导航与首页内容，快速生成高质量静态文档站。

features.title: Astro 原生
features.details: 使用 Astro 与 MDX 渲染文档，无需自建复杂的 Markdown 渲染链路。

features.title: CLI 驱动
features.details: 通过 stropress dev 或 stropress build，直接对任意 docs 目录进行构建。

features.title: 配置优先
features.details: 导航、侧边栏、首页主视觉与功能卡片均可在 config.json 中声明。
